content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Frances H. Arnold, George P. Smith, and Sir Gregory P. Winter for their work on directing the evolution of enzymes and the phage display of peptides and antibodies.
raw_content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded to Frances H. Arnold, George P. Smith, and Sir Gregory P. Winter for their work on directing the evolution of enzymes and the phage display of peptides and antibodies.
